function.message: I reviewed the next inbox note and cannot complete the OCR task as requested because one of the listed source items is missing/unopenable. Please confirm the correct fifth file (or confirm it was a duplicate) and I can proceed.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item plus inbox-processing-v2-update and migrate-records-to-frontmatter: do not leave partial edits when task is not doable; ask for clarification instead of guessing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md specifies five OCR targets, but one target could not be read (file-not-found) and therefore the set is incomplete. Per workflow, I made no mutations and requested clarification.
